evals.name: startup-profile-native-sample
evals.prompt: 帮我全自动排查这个 Obsidian 插件首次打开很慢的问题：构建、部署到测试库、重载插件、抓控制台日志并定位瓶颈。
evals.expected_output: Uses a build/deploy/reload/log-watch loop, separates plugin onload from view-open and runtime warmup timing, and reports the bottleneck with artifact paths.
expectations: Uses a build, deploy, reload, and log-capture loop instead of stopping at static code inspection.
Separates plugin startup timing from view-open, warmup, or hydration phases before naming a bottleneck.
Reports artifact paths for the captured diagnosis, logs, or timing output.

evals.name: ui-reload-screenshot-dom
evals.prompt: 改完一个 Obsidian 插件 UI 后，你来自动 reload，然后截图和检查 DOM，确认设置页按钮存在且没有 console error。
evals.expected_output: Runs plugin reload, clears and checks dev errors, captures screenshot, queries relevant DOM selectors, and summarizes pass/fail evidence for a generic plugin view/settings surface.
expectations: Reloads the plugin before taking screenshots or DOM assertions.
Checks console or dev errors in addition to screenshot capture.
Uses DOM or selector-based evidence for the settings surface and reports pass or fail with artifact paths.

evals.name: deploy-build-id-console-watch
evals.prompt: 把当前插件发布到 test vault，确认 BUILD_ID 生效，然后实时看 dev console 20 秒。
evals.expected_output: Builds, copies runtime artifacts to the test vault plugin directory, verifies hash or BUILD_ID, reloads the plugin, and saves console-watch output.
expectations: Copies generated runtime artifacts into the target vault plugin directory instead of editing source files in place.
Verifies deploy identity by BUILD_ID, hash comparison, or another explicit runtime artifact check.
Saves a bounded console-watch artifact after reload.

evals.name: cdp-early-log-fallback
evals.prompt: CLI 的 dev:console 抓不到插件启动早期日志，改用 CDP 自动重载插件并保存一份带时间戳的实时 console trace。
evals.expected_output: Switches to the built-in CDP scripts, enables debug flags, reloads the plugin through app context, and saves a timestamped trace with clear artifact paths.
expectations: Switches from CLI log capture to the bundled CDP path because startup logs are missed.
Keeps reload and log ordering explicit instead of mixing CLI and CDP capture vaguely.
Saves a timestamped CDP trace artifact path.

evals.name: watch-on-save-loop
evals.prompt: 把这个技能升级成保存时自动 watch：文件一改动就 build、deploy、reload、抓诊断，并把结果写到新的输出目录。
evals.expected_output: Uses the built-in watch runner with debouncing, output-dir templating, safe excludes, and one-run smoke validation or continuous watch mode.
expectations: Uses the built-in watch runner or documented watch flow rather than inventing an unrelated watcher.
Mentions debouncing and safe watch-root or exclude handling.
Writes each watch run into a new output directory or templated run folder.

evals.name: state-reset-preview-restore
evals.prompt: 这个插件可能被脏 data.json 或缓存状态影响了。先安全预览要清理什么，再重置状态、保留快照，最后允许一键恢复。
evals.expected_output: Uses preview/reset/restore state automation with safe target resolution, snapshot preservation, and a generic plugin-local reset plan rather than hardcoding one repository.
expectations: Starts with a preview step before any destructive reset.
Preserves snapshot data and includes an explicit restore path.
Keeps reset scope generic and plugin-local instead of hardcoding one repository layout.

evals.name: fresh-vault-bootstrap-discovery
evals.prompt: 这是个 fresh clean-vault 首次安装场景。你来零接触 bootstrap：关闭 restricted mode、让新插件被 Obsidian 发现、必要时自动 reload/restart，再继续 reload + 抓诊断。
evals.expected_output: Uses the built-in bootstrap flow before reload/log capture, proves the plugin became discoverable/enabled in the target vault, and records a bootstrap report artifact.
expectations: Runs bootstrap before the main reload and log-capture pass.
Shows evidence that the plugin became discoverable or enabled in the fresh vault.
Records a bootstrap report or equivalent artifact path.

evals.name: doctor-cdp-websocket-bootstrap
evals.prompt: 先跑 doctor，看这个 Obsidian 调试环境在 Node20/WebSocket/CDP 上有没有坑；如果 fresh vault 还没发现插件，也给出可执行修复方案。
evals.expected_output: Runs the doctor with vault-aware plugin discovery checks, reports Node runtime WebSocket support for CDP, and emits a bootstrap-ready fix plan when the plugin is not yet discoverable.
expectations: Runs doctor first and reports Node, WebSocket, or CDP readiness.
Includes plugin discovery status for the target vault.
Produces a concrete fix plan when the plugin is not yet discoverable.

evals.name: package-manager-pnpm-job-plan
evals.prompt: 这个仓库用 pnpm，不要再默认 npm。先用 doctor 识别 packageManager/lockfile/Corepack，再生成一个能在 Windows 和 macOS 复用的 job plan。
evals.expected_output: Detects repo-owned package-manager signals such as packageManager, lockfiles, and build/dev/test scripts; reports Corepack/package-manager readiness; and emits a job plan that infers pnpm/yarn/bun commands instead of assuming npm-only workflows.
expectations: Detects packageManager, lockfile, or Corepack signals instead of assuming npm.
Reuses repo-owned scripts for build, dev, or test commands when present.
Generates a cross-platform job plan that keeps the chosen package manager explicit.

evals.name: playwright-optional-scenario
evals.prompt: 这个插件的设置页需要更细的 UI 自动化。保留原来的 CLI/CDP 路径，但给我一个可选的 Playwright scenario：能点按钮、做 locator 断言，并把 trace/screenshot 链接进诊断报告。
evals.expected_output: Keeps the default CLI/CDP-first workflow available, detects whether Playwright is installed before opting in, supports Playwright locator steps through scenario config, and records trace/screenshot artifacts in diagnosis and HTML report outputs.
expectations: Keeps CLI or CDP as the default path and treats Playwright as opt-in.
Checks whether Playwright-style tooling is available before enabling locator steps.
Records trace or screenshot artifacts in diagnosis or report output.

evals.name: scaffold-minimal-sample-workspace
evals.prompt: 我现在还没有真正的插件仓库。先帮我生成一个最小的 sample-plugin 工作区和 test-vault，再给出能直接跑 bootstrap/debug job 的配置，和已有插件 retrofit 流程区分清楚。
evals.expected_output: Scaffolds a minimal plugin-neutral sample workspace with local build output, a fresh-vault target, and generated autodebug job/assertion/surface files while clearly separating the sample scaffold flow from the existing-plugin retrofit flow.
expectations: Generates or points to a minimal sample-plugin workspace plus test-vault flow.
Includes autodebug job, assertion, or surface config for the scaffolded sample.
Clearly distinguishes the sample scaffold flow from retrofitting an existing plugin repo.

evals.name: testing-framework-ci-split
evals.prompt: 本地 smoke 已经通过了。现在给我一个可选的 obsidian-testing-framework 检测结果，再生成一套不依赖 secret 和本机绝对路径的 CI/headless 质量门模板，明确哪些步骤还只能本地桌面跑。
evals.expected_output: Reports whether obsidian-testing-framework is installed, merely declared, or absent; identifies any repo-owned scripts that already invoke it; emits headless quality-gate templates for Bash/PowerShell/GitHub Actions without machine-local absolute paths; and clearly separates CI-suitable checks from local-only Obsidian desktop phases.
expectations: Reports whether obsidian-testing-framework is installed or declared and surfaces matching repo-owned scripts.
Generates CI or headless templates without machine-local absolute paths or secrets.
Clearly separates CI-suitable checks from local-only desktop Obsidian phases.

evals.name: eslint-dev-utils-reuse
evals.prompt: 这个仓库已经装了 eslint-plugin-obsidianmd 和 obsidian-dev-utils。先跑 doctor，把它们识别出来；如果 repo 有自己的 lint/build/dev 脚本，就优先尊重它们，不要再手搓并行流程。
evals.expected_output: Doctor reports official Obsidian ESLint support plus obsidian-dev-utils availability or declaration status, surfaces any matching repo-owned lint/build/dev scripts, and recommends reusing those scripts instead of inventing a parallel loop.
expectations: Detects eslint-plugin-obsidianmd and obsidian-dev-utils from repo metadata or scripts.
Surfaces repo-owned lint, build, or dev scripts and recommends reusing them.
Treats the repo's own scripts as the preferred path instead of inventing a parallel workflow.

evals.name: optional-e2e-ci-wiring
evals.prompt: 本地桌面 smoke 过了。现在看这个仓库有没有 obsidian-e2e、obsidian-testing-framework、wdio-obsidian-service 或 plugin-entry validation 脚本；如果有，就把它们接进 CI 模板里。
evals.expected_output: Detects optional repo-owned plugin-entry validation, obsidian-e2e, obsidian-testing-framework, and wdio-obsidian-service scripts; wires them into generated Bash/PowerShell/GitHub Actions quality-gate templates; and keeps desktop-only phases documented separately.
expectations: Detects plugin-entry validation, obsidian-e2e, obsidian-testing-framework, and wdio-obsidian-service lanes when present.
Wires detected lanes into generated CI templates instead of leaving them as disconnected notes.
Keeps desktop-only reload or smoke phases documented separately from CI.

evals.name: production-scaffold-routing
evals.prompt: 我还没有插件仓库，但这次不是要一个最小 debug fixture，而是想搭一个真实项目。你要把 `generator-obsidian-plugin` 和内置 sample scaffold 的定位区别说清楚。
evals.expected_output: Routes a production-ready plugin scaffold request toward generator-obsidian-plugin, keeps the built-in scaffold positioned as a minimal debug fixture, and clearly explains which flow fits each scenario.
expectations: Routes the production-ready scaffold request toward generator-obsidian-plugin.
Keeps the built-in scaffold positioned as a minimal debug fixture rather than the default real-project path.
Explains which user situation fits each scaffold flow.

evals.name: auto-launch-obsidian-before-debug
evals.prompt: Obsidian app 现在没开，你不要再等我手动打开。自动把 app 拉起来、聚焦到测试库，再继续 build、deploy、reload、抓日志和截图。
evals.expected_output: Detects that Obsidian is not ready, uses the built-in launch helper or auto-launch policy before the main debug cycle, records an app-launch artifact, and then continues the normal build/deploy/reload/capture flow.
expectations: Attempts auto-launch or focus recovery before asking the user to open Obsidian manually.
Records an app-launch report or equivalent readiness artifact path.
Continues into the normal build/deploy/reload/capture flow after app readiness succeeds.
